data.body:
COMPLETION EVIDENCE — work landed on main.
- Gerrit change 819 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/819) is MERGED with LLM-Review +1 (review bot) AND Verified +1 (gerrit-verify CI); submittable=True, unresolved_comment_count=0.
- The implementing commit is on origin/main as 138480664 ('b550: standardize GitHub Actions workflow names + extensions') carrying the 'rebar-ticket: b550-b5fc-b2e4-4396' trailer (Gerrit rebased on submit, so the SHA differs from the pushed 583c262).
- All ACs met: every workflow now has a descriptive Title-Case name: (pinned by tests/unit/test_workflow_names.py); eval.yml->prompt-eval.yml and verify-identity.yaml->verify-identity.yml renamed with references updated; eval-plan-review-container.yml deleted (da34 closed); gerrit-verify.yaml and release.yml filenames unchanged; make lint (actionlint) + the workflow-pinning tests (test_ci_workflow_parity, test_external_canary, test_verify_opcert_heldout, test_ci_actionlint_scope) pass — confirmed by the Verified +1 CI run.
The prior 'Awaiting ... before submit' comment is now superseded: both votes were received and the change is merged.
